summary: Iteration 60: Verified GPT-5.2 solo prediction (replacing 3-AI consensus) and INTEL tab smart filters. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with 8 filter dropdowns (Position, League, Venue, Game Type, Prop, Direction, Result, Opponent search), clear filters button, and dynamic filtered stats.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing settled picks in preview DB (15 soccer, 11 basketball)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified: (1) GPT-5.2 solo prediction replaces 3-AI consensus in both predict.py and basketball_predict.py. The elite calibration engine now acts as second opinion. (2) INTEL tab has 8 smart filter dropdowns: Position, League, Venue, Game Type, Prop, Direction (over/under), Result (hit/miss/push), and Opponent text search. (3) Calibration breakdown section has been removed from INTEL tab. (4) Clear filters button appears when any filter is active. (5) Filtered stats (rate/hits/misses) update dynamically when filters are applied. (6) Soccer data: 15 picks, 80% rate. Basketball data: 11 picks, 54.5% rate. (7) All filter columns have valid values in the intel sheet response.

gpt52_solo_prediction.soccer_predict: POST /api/predict uses GPT-5.2 solo with elite calibration (lines 1781-1830)
gpt52_solo_prediction.basketball_predict: POST /api/basketball/predict uses GPT-5.2 solo with elite calibration (lines 849-890)
gpt52_solo_prediction.consensus_note: Solo GPT-5.2 analysis with elite calibration corrections
gpt52_solo_prediction.no_3ai_consensus: 3-AI consensus (GPT-5.2 + Gemini + Grok) replaced by solo GPT-5.2

intel_tab_smart_filters.opponent_search: Text input for opponent name search
intel_tab_smart_filters.clear_filters_button: Appears when any filter is active (data-testid='clear-filters')
intel_tab_smart_filters.filtered_stats: Rate/Hits/Misses update dynamically when filters applied
